input.title: Payment service 5xx error rate spike — 45% of requests failing
input.description: Error rate for /api/v2/payment/process exceeded 40% threshold. P99 latency: 8200ms. Last deploy: v2.4.1 (2h ago).

ground_truth.root_cause: New deploy v2.4.1 introduced a missing database index on payment_transactions.created_at causing full table scans under load
